data.title: DORE Acquires 250,000 Shares for Treasury
data.description:
Downing Renewables & Infrastructure Trust Plc ( (GB:DORE) ) has shared an update.

Downing Renewables & Infrastructure Trust plc announced the purchase of 250,000 of its own ordinary shares at an average price of 81.69 pence per share, which will be held in treasury. This transaction affects the company’s share capital, leaving 170,311,600 ordinary shares in circulation with voting rights. This move may impact shareholder calculations under the FCA’s Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules.

More about Downing Renewables & Infrastructure Trust Plc

Downing Renewables & Infrastructure Trust plc (DORE) is a closed-end investment trust that invests in a diversified portfolio of renewable energy and infrastructure assets in the UK and Northern Europe. The company aims to provide investors with sustainable income and capital growth, contributing to the global ‘Green Economy’. Managed by Downing LLP, DORE focuses on accelerating the transition to net zero through its investments.

YTD Price Performance: 9.42%

Average Trading Volume: 184,074

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: £139.5M

For an in-depth examination of DORE stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: GCP Infra Executes Share Buyback to Optimize Capital Structure
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from GCP Infra Invt Shs GBP ( (GB:GCP) ).

GCP Infrastructure Investments Ltd announced the repurchase of 390,000 ordinary shares at an average price of 75.07 pence per share, to be held in treasury. This transaction follows the authority granted by shareholders to make market purchases, impacting the company’s issued share capital and voting rights, with 853,031,116 voting rights now in circulation. This strategic move may influence shareholder interests and the company’s market positioning.

More about GCP Infra Invt Shs GBP

GCP Infrastructure Investments Ltd is a closed-ended investment company and a constituent of the FTSE-250, with its shares traded on the London Stock Exchange. The company aims to provide shareholders with regular, sustained, long-term distributions while preserving capital by investing in UK infrastructure debt and related assets. GCP Infra focuses on infrastructure projects with long-term, public sector-backed revenues and seeks to incorporate partial inflation protection in its investments. It is advised by Gravis Capital Management Limited and has received the London Stock Exchange’s Green Economy Mark for its positive environmental contributions.

YTD Price Performance: 12.90%

Average Trading Volume: 1,536,405

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

See more insights into GCP stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Cool Company Ltd. Reports Strong Q4 2024 Results Amid Market Challenges
data.description:
Cool Company Ltd ( (CLCO) ) has shared an announcement.

On February 27, 2025, Cool Company Ltd. reported its Q4 2024 financial results, highlighting a total operating revenue of $84.6 million and a net income of $29.41 million, driven by a mark-to-market gain in interest rate swaps. Despite challenges in the LNG shipping market, including high LNG prices in Europe and a surplus of newbuild vessels affecting charter rates, CoolCo managed to maintain a strong financial position with $288 million in liquidity and no debt maturities until mid-2029. The company did not declare a dividend due to market conditions but emphasized its strategic focus on financial flexibility and potential growth opportunities.

More about Cool Company Ltd

Cool Company Ltd., also known as CoolCo, operates within the LNG shipping industry, focusing on the transportation of liquefied natural gas. The company is involved in the management and operation of a fleet of vessels, providing services primarily through time and voyage charters.

YTD Price Performance: -31.38%

Average Trading Volume: 242,259

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $301.7M

Learn more about CLCO stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Esseco’s Acquisition Offer for Ercros Undergoes Further Scrutiny
data.description:
Ercros SA ( (ES:ECR) ) has issued an update.

Esseco Industrial, S.P.A. has announced that the Competition Authority of Portugal will begin a second phase of analysis regarding its public offer to acquire all shares of Ercros, S.A. This step is crucial as obtaining authorization from the AdC is a condition for the effectiveness of the offer, which could impact the company’s market position and stakeholder interests.

More about Ercros SA

data.title: Rightmove Executes Share Buy-Back Program
data.description:
Rightmove ( (GB:RMV) ) has provided an announcement.

Rightmove plc has executed a share buy-back program, purchasing 165,000 of its ordinary shares at an average price of 687.430p per share. This transaction represents 0.0211% of the company’s voting rights, and the shares will be canceled, reflecting Rightmove’s ongoing strategy to manage its capital structure and return value to shareholders.

More about Rightmove

Rightmove plc operates in the real estate industry, primarily focusing on providing online property listings and related services. The company is a leading property portal in the UK, facilitating property searches for buyers, renters, and real estate professionals.

data.title: Ming Shing Group Reports Revenue Growth Amid Nasdaq Listing
data.description:
Ming Shing Group Holdings Limited ( (MSW) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Ming Shing Group Holdings Limited announced its unaudited financial results for the six months ended September 30, 2024, showing a 31.8% increase in total revenue to $17.4 million, driven by more project awards. Despite this growth, net income decreased by 2.7% due to higher interest costs. The company, which listed on Nasdaq in November 2024, sees this as a milestone and plans to leverage its expertise to capture growth in the Hong Kong wet trades market.

More about Ming Shing Group Holdings Limited

Ming Shing Group Holdings Limited is a Hong Kong-based company specializing in wet trades works, including plastering, tile laying, brick laying, floor screeding, and marble works. The company operates through its subsidiaries, MS (HK) Engineering Limited and MS Engineering Co., Limited, focusing on both private and public sector projects in Hong Kong.

YTD Price Performance: -14.59%

Average Trading Volume: 358,340

data.title: Kaspi.kz Announces $650 Million Eurobond Offering
data.description:
Kaspi.kz JSC Sponsored ADR RegS ( (KSPI) ) has shared an update.

On March 21, 2025, Kaspi.kz announced the pricing of a $650 million Eurobond offering with a 6.250% interest rate due in 2030, marking the largest investment-grade bond issuance by a non-sovereign entity from Kazakhstan. The issuance highlights Kaspi.kz’s robust business model and strong market position, as the company plans to use the proceeds for general corporate purposes, further strengthening its financial standing and operational capabilities.

More about Kaspi.kz JSC Sponsored ADR RegS

Kaspi.kz is a company focused on improving people’s lives through innovative mobile products and services, operating a unique two-sided Super App model. The Kaspi.kz Super App caters to consumers, while Kaspi Pay Super App serves merchants, offering leading Payments, Marketplace, and Fintech Platforms. This approach results in strong growth and a profitable business model, with a significant presence in Kazakhstan and Türkiye.

YTD Price Performance: -3.31%

Average Trading Volume: 311,383

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $18.91B

Learn more about KSPI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Epwin Group Plc has executed a share repurchase program, buying back 25,000 ordinary shares at a price of 90 pence each, with the intention to cancel these shares. Epwin Group Plc is a leading manufacturer of energy-efficient and low-maintenance building products with significant market shares in the Repair, Maintenance and Improvement (RMI), new build, and social housing sectors. The company is based in the United Kingdom.

data.title: Entain Releases 2024 Annual Report and Announces Board Change
data.description:
Entain plc ( (GB:ENT) ) just unveiled an update.

Entain plc has released its 2024 Annual Report and Accounts, along with the Notice of its 2025 Annual General Meeting (AGM), which will be held on April 23, 2025. The company announced that Ronald Kramer, a Non-Executive Director, will not seek re-election and will step down from the Board at the AGM. This change in the board may impact the company’s strategic direction and governance.

More about Entain plc

Entain plc is a FTSE100 company and one of the world’s largest sports betting and gaming groups, operating both online and in the retail sector. It owns a comprehensive portfolio of established sports and gaming brands and operates the TAB NZ brand in partnership with TAB New Zealand. Entain also has a 50/50 joint venture, BetMGM, a leader in sports betting and iGaming in the US. The company is a leader in ESG and operates in over 30 territories.

YTD Price Performance: -3.57%

Average Trading Volume: 2,259,538

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: £4.2B
